CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2016 Assigned To Arbitration On Jul-11-16

Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Alexander Lubarsky telephone number 408-272-3145 for Defendant/Moving Party Edwin Trabanino.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EDWIN TRABANINO'S Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment is granted. After reviewing the supplemental declarations, the court is satisfied that, while Mr. Trabanino was aware of the contention that he was responsible for the 2012 accident in 2013, he did not receive actual notice of this lawsuit from the service of a summons in time to defend the case, his lack of actual notice was not caused by his avoidance or inexcusable neglect and it was not until November 2015 that he learned that a default judgment was entered against him. Once he learned about the default judgment, he acted diligently to have it set aside. Mr. Trabanino has thus satisfied all the requirements in CCP 473.5 for the setting aside of the default judgment and the court exercises its discretion to grant this motion. The granting of the motion is strongly supported by California's policy favoring of resolving cases on their merits. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)

Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-04-2016 Continued To May-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexander Lubarsky of Community Legal Centers telephone number 415-370-7893 for Defendant Edwin Trabanino.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person at the time the matter was called.

The Court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EDWIN TRABANINO's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment is continued to May 5, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. Mr. Lubarsky is to file supplemental opposition papers and a declaration from his Client stating knowledge he had of service of the complaint and of the law suit by April 18, 2016. Supplemental reply is due by April 25, 2016. Mr. Lubarsky is to give notice to Counsel for the Plaintiff and do a new notice of hearing.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

**** Brandon Tang of Law Office of Jay Smith telephone number 818-709-2556 for Plaintiff Nationwide appeared after the matter was called and informed the Court that he was aware of the new hearing date and the deadlines, and that he was okay with it.
